steps.title: Identify the transition relationship needed
steps.content: After claiming Chaucer pioneered literary English, the second sentence provides specific examples and evidence of this fact (2,000+ word uses documented in his work). The transition must signal that this evidence reinforces the previous claim.

steps.title: Apply to the answer choices
steps.content: Indeed signals reinforcement—it affirms the previous claim and introduces the supporting evidence that follows. The other three wrongly suggest contrast, concession, or separate information. That matches choice B — B is correct.
